args.summary: Customer Omar Ahmed (user_id: omar_ahmed_3737) wants to modify reservation 1Q7D34 to change flight dates, upgrade to business class, and add extra checked bags. However, both flights in the reservation (HAT085 and HAT261 on 2024-05-14) have already landed, meaning they have been flown. According to policy, cabin cannot be changed if any flight in the reservation has already been flown, and flight modifications are not possible for flights that have already been taken. This requires human agent assistance.

Customer Omar Ahmed (user_id: omar_ahmed_3737) wants to modify reservation 1Q7D34 to change flight dates, upgrade to business class, and add extra checked bags. However, both flights in the reservation (HAT085 and HAT261 on 2024-05-14) have already landed, meaning they have been flown. According to policy, cabin cannot be changed if any flight in the reservation has already been flown, and flight modifications are not possible for flights that have already been taken. This requires human agent assistance.
